decisions: Turn 1: Step 0 cross-session aggregation runs ahead of the smoke body. It is deterministic bookkeeping over existing raw JSONs, not another acquisition round.

Turn 1: platform_category (from Chzzk videoCategoryValue) is named authoritative axis label in the aggregation output, per the acquisition-followup schema fix. Cells lacking platform_category are counted in covered_cell_count via genre/insufficient_data but excluded from platform_category distinct-count.

Turn 1: Honest Step 0 evaluate_global output downgrades the prior acquisition-followup seal's 5-cell-if-aggregated framing to covered_cell_count=3. W1/W2/W3 are all insufficient_data=true in the committed 2026-04-15 A4 raw JSON due to initial-pair cache-hot retry-collapse across every chunk.

Turn 1: Pooled dispersion fails because W5-olympics-nochat (P95=4.6886) is an outlier against chat-fed cells (P95 about 3.0). Dispersion policy across chat vs no-chat cells is now an open contract question for the next measurement session.

Turn 1: Full-pipeline smoke against VOD 11688000 with --limit-duration 1800 ran end-to-end on current runtime defaults (chunk_max_chars=150000, chunk_overlap_sec=45, chunk_max_tokens unset, claude_timeout_sec=300). No runtime-default promotion was required for wiring correctness.
Turn 2: The authoritative completion marker is output/pipeline_state.json -> processed_vods[11688000].status=completed, not a top-level status field.
Turn 2: Inline summarizer regression is confirmed with the smoke chats and metadata-backed highlights. The reproduced _generate_html(...) length is 20676, not 18072.
meta_improvements: Prior seal's aggregation prediction overstated validity: use evaluate_global's actual output, not a count of axis points, when framing cross-session coverage in handoffs.

Whisper/Silero tqdm progress bars currently land in pipeline stdout as carriage-return-overwritten single lines, producing unreadable logs. A future pipeline-smoke runner should redirect tqdm to stderr or discard it, independent of pipeline runtime behavior.

experiments/test_parser.py and experiments/test_html_render.py hardcode a specific VOD output path. They should take the md path as argv[1] so they can be re-used across smoke outputs without manual edit.

The sister worktree's gitignored pipeline_config.json has to be a read-through copy of live to run the pipeline end-to-end. Track this in any future smoke SOP so the copy happens once and the bytes are never hand-edited in sister.
When recording smoke results, keep JSON field paths literal. For output/pipeline_state.json, the completion marker sits under processed_vods[video_no], not at the top level.
When documenting summarizer regression numbers, record the exact _generate_html(...) call inputs. The output length changes depending on whether smoke chats and highlights are supplied.
